title: People living in deprived neighbourhoods by ethnicity
description: Share of each ethnic group living in the 10% most deprived neighbourhoods in England, based on the Index of Multiple Deprivation 2019.

metadata.name: People living in deprived neighbourhoods
metadata.methodology: Official analysis of the English Index of Multiple Deprivation (IMD) 2019 by ethnic group. The IMD measures relative deprivation across seven domains: income, employment, education, health, crime, housing, and living environment.
caveats: The IMD 2019 is the most recent index available; a newer release may follow.
England only — Wales, Scotland, and Northern Ireland have separate indices.
